testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 1: Express API + PostgreSQL
testcase.name: should generate Express API project with PostgreSQL

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 1: Express API + PostgreSQL
testcase.name: should generate valid package.json with correct dependencies

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 2: React + Node.js Full Stack
testcase.name: should generate full-stack project with React frontend

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 2: React + Node.js Full Stack
testcase.name: should include React dependencies

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 3: FastAPI + MongoDB
testcase.name: should handle non-Node.js tech stack

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 4: CLI Tool
testcase.name: should generate CLI project structure

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 5: Dependency Auto-Resolution
testcase.name: should add dependencies based on tech stack

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 5: Dependency Auto-Resolution
testcase.name: should not add JavaScript dependencies to TypeScript project

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 6: File Path Normalization
testcase.name: should generate valid file paths

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 6: File Path Normalization
testcase.name: should handle special characters in project name

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 7: Performance
testcase.name: should generate code within 500ms

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 7: Performance
testcase.name: should generate configs within 100ms

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 8: Large Project Generation
testcase.name: should generate 35+ files for complex project

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 8: Large Project Generation
testcase.name: should generate valid code structure for multi-feature project

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 9: Environment Configuration
testcase.name: should generate all configuration files

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 9: Environment Configuration
testcase.name: should include database configuration in .env

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 9: Environment Configuration
testcase.name: should generate MongoDB config for MongoDB projects

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 10: Project Type Accuracy
testcase.name: should generate appropriate files for API project

testcase.name: should generate appropriate files for Web project

testcase.classname: CodeGen Integration Tests › Test 10: Project Type Accuracy
testcase.name: should generate appropriate files for CLI project
